title: diasperus nummularioides
intro: Diasperus nummularioides, also known as Nummularia or coin bush, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Diasperus nummularioides include the treatment of skin conditions, such as acne, eczema, and dermatitis, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Diasperus nummularioides is often prepared into herbal teas, ointments, and tinctures to be used for topical and internal applications.
